who: HR managers in mid-sized tech companies with 50-200 employees
offer: For HR managers in mid-sized tech companies processing 50-200 employees, high turnover rates cause increased recruitment costs. We provide predictive analytics instead of manual tracking.
problem: High employee turnover rates leading to increased recruitment costs.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on HR tools
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video
Participate in HR forums sharing best practices
try_it: Let users try employee satisfaction survey templates and turnover dashboard
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing employee data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline the onboarding process with fewer steps
